summary: Prayer times cron job for July 2026 ran on June 6. Generated EIK-adjusted .ics file (186 events) successfully, but Google OAuth token was expired/revoked so calendar events were not created and .ics was not emailed. Token expiry was May 25, 2026. The OAuth refresh token for runnerhermes84@gmail.com no longer works (invalid_grant) — Google testing-mode OAuth tokens expire after ~7 days of inactivity.
